title: Prediction for what EVA 08s Pilot might be and look like

wikitext:
[]: Prediction for what EVA-08's Pilot might be and look like Post by trkk-KAAN » Fri Jul 06, 2012 5:20 pm post in your interpetation and prediction of who do you think might be EVA-08's Pilot, put in the name and its back story, it has to be interesting and creative too.

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jul 06, 2012 6:10 pm I came here with promise of a prediction for what they look like. You have teased me, sir. This is not how threads work. You do not say 'hey, we need a thread for this!' yet not have any content for the OP. Nope.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Fri Jul 06, 2012 6:10 pm Yeah, where's the prediction?! I want my money back!

[]: Post by driftking18594 » Fri Jul 06, 2012 6:19 pm Can Pirate Asuka please force the OP to walk the plank?

[]: Post by Jayfive » Fri Jul 06, 2012 6:31 pm And be using ARRRRR type equipment...

[]: Post by Jornophelanthas » Fri Jul 06, 2012 7:23 pm The OP's prediction would probably just be a character description that suspiciously matches the main character of some other anime to a tee.

[]: Post by Na7e » Fri Jul 06, 2012 7:32 pm Jornophelanthas wrote: The OP's prediction would probably just be a character description that suspiciously matches the main character of some other anime to a tee.
